---
title: "SharkRichness"
author: "Nicholas K. Dulvy"
date: "`r Sys.Date()`"
output: html_document
---

## Running in Cursor

Open this repo in Cursor, then run chunks from top to bottom. If you render the
whole document, do so from the repo root so `here()` resolves paths correctly.

```{r setup_shark_richness}
# Chunk name suggestion: setup_shark_richness
# Purpose: load packages, shared functions, and precomputed spatial inputs.

# Dependencies:
# - Packages: sf, dplyr, here, patchwork, rnaturalearth, ggplot2, hexbin
# - Data: data/processed/hex.rds, data/processed/ranges.rds
# - Functions: mapping/00_functions.R (calculate_hex_metrics2, plot_species_richness_map)

library(sf)
library(dplyr)
library(here)
library(patchwork)
library(rnaturalearth)
library(ggplot2)
library(hexbin)
library(purrr)
library(furrr)
library(future)

# Load shared functions
source(here("mapping/00_functions.R"))

# Load precomputed spatial inputs
hex_path <- here("data/processed/hex.rds")
if (!file.exists(hex_path)) {
  stop("Missing data/processed/hex.rds. Run 01_SpatialDataProcessing.Rmd first.")
}
hex <- readRDS(hex_path)

ranges_path <- here("data/processed/ranges.rds")
if (!file.exists(ranges_path)) {
  stop("Missing data/processed/ranges.rds. Run 01_SpatialDataProcessing.Rmd first.")
}
ranges <- readRDS(ranges_path)
```

```{r shark_richness_map}
# Chunk name suggestion: shark_richness_map
# Purpose: compute and map shark species richness by order.

# Orders included as sharks (confirmed by user)
shark_orders <- c(
  "CARCHARHINIFORMES",
  "LAMNIFORMES",
  "ORECTOLOBIFORMES",
  "HETERODONTIFORMES",
  "SQUALIFORMES",
  "HEXANCHIFORMES",
  "PRISTIOPHORIFORMES",
  "SQUATINIFORMES"
)

# Filter to shark ranges
ranges_sharks <- ranges %>%
  filter(order_ %in% shark_orders)

# Compute richness metrics and map
hex_with_metrics_sharks <- calculate_hex_metrics2(ranges_sharks, hex)

shark_richness_map <- plot_species_richness_map(
  hex_with_metrics_sharks,
  map_title = "Shark richness"
) %>%
  apply_lat_axis_labels()

shark_richness_map

# Date tag for output filenames (yymmdd)
date_tag <- format(Sys.Date(), "%y%m%d")

ggsave(
  filename = here(sprintf("mapping/figures/SharkRichness_%s.png", date_tag)),
  plot = shark_richness_map,
  width = 7,
  height = 5,
  units = "in",
  dpi = 600
)
```

```{r shark_richness_hexbin}
# Chunk name suggestion: shark_richness_hexbin
# Purpose: hexbin plot of shark richness versus latitude.

add_lat_lon <- function(sf_obj) {
  pts <- st_point_on_surface(sf_obj)
  pts_ll <- st_transform(pts, 4326)
  coords <- st_coordinates(pts_ll)
  sf_obj$lon <- coords[, "X"]
  sf_obj$lat <- coords[, "Y"]
  sf_obj
}

hex_with_metrics_sharks <- add_lat_lon(hex_with_metrics_sharks)

hexbin_df <- hex_with_metrics_sharks %>%
  st_drop_geometry() %>%
  filter(is.finite(lat), is.finite(species_richness), species_richness > 0)

shark_hexbin <- ggplot(hexbin_df, aes(x = lat, y = species_richness)) +
  geom_hex(bins = 40) +
  scale_fill_viridis_c(option = "D", direction = -1) +
  coord_cartesian(xlim = c(-90, 90), ylim = c(0, 65), expand = FALSE) +
  scale_x_continuous(
    breaks = c(-90, -60, -30, 0, 30, 60, 90),
    labels = c("90°S", "60°S", "30°S", "0°", "30°N", "60°N", "90°N")
  ) +
  theme_bw() +
  theme(
    panel.grid.major = element_blank(),
    panel.grid.minor = element_blank()
  ) +
  labs(
    title = "Shark richness vs latitude",
    x = "Latitude",
    y = "Species richness",
    fill = "Count"
  )

shark_hexbin

ggsave(
  filename = here(sprintf("mapping/figures/SharkRichness_Hexbin_%s.png", date_tag)),
  plot = shark_hexbin,
  width = 7,
  height = 5,
  units = "in",
  dpi = 600
)
```
